saved_test.name: Advanced Word Order / Emphasis — Opus 4.6 V3 Questions Test
saved_test.description: Practice set for advanced word order and emphasis: inversion after negative adverbs, it-cleft and what-cleft sentences, all-cleft constructions, emphatic do/does/did, conditional inversion, fronting of adverbials, and so/such inversion across A1–C2.
